title: pouteria collina
intro: Pouteria collina, also known as the Brazilian cherry tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pouteria collina include the potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use in treating various infections and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Pouteria collina typically involve the bark or leaves being made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
